docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-19-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. PLAINTIFF TO BRING SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED.
